printed.name: Side Lift
printed.setup: Lying on side in neutral spine position, arms straight, head resting on bottom arm, top hand holding PTBar, pelvis perpendicular to Mat, legs straight and aligned with trunk, top leg in front, feet plantarflexed

movement.inhale: Bend and straighten top arm, bringing PTBar forward and up
movement.exhale: Lift trunk into lateral flexion, lifting bottom arm toward PTBar

cues: Keep arm on PTBar straight while lifting body
Imagine moving between two panes of glass
